# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud iam misconfiguration and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cosmosDbName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "functionAppResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]",
    "storageAccountResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
    "keyVaultResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
    "sqlServerResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
    "cosmosDbResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/providers/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('functionAppResourceId'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(variables('functionAppResourceId')), 'storage'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '81a9662b-b03d-4f9d-b884-e78e02a64288')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(variables('storageAccountResourceId'), '2019-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "scope": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/providers/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('functionAppResourceId'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(variables('functionAppResourceId')), 'keyVault'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '004d9167-58b0-410f-a28e-c73f8137148e')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(variables('keyVaultResourceId'), '2019-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "scope": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/providers/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('functionAppResourceId'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(variables('functionAppResourceId')), 'sql'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '914d35bc-e8f7-466c-bd68-e2133974fcc7')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(variables('sqlServerResourceId'), '2019-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "scope": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/providers/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('functionAppResourceId'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(variables('functionAppResourceId')), 'cosmos'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '34e09814-b734-41b8-b577-921258ac779f')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(variables('cosmosDbResourceId'), '2019-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "scope": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/', parameters('cosmosDbName'))]"
      }
    }
  ]
